But first follow me for more hidden beaches around Florida!

📍Fred Howard Park
1700 Sunset Drive
Tarpon Springs, Florida 34689

🚗Parking: $6 per day per car 

⏰Hours
Open 7 days a week, 7 a.m. to sunset except the day after Thanksgiving and December 25.

🌴Amenities
Nine Picnic Shelters and grills 
Six Restrooms
Two Playgrounds
Showers 
Kayak rentals
